# HealthGait

> Your gait tells a story. Clinical gait analysis powered by AI — walking speed, ankle power, balance metrics, and fall risk prediction.

## What we do
HealthGait provides clinical-grade gait analysis using phone sensors and AI. Measures walking speed (the "sixth vital sign"), ankle power, stride variability, and balance. Used by clinicians for fall risk assessment, post-surgical recovery tracking, and functional outcome measurement.

## Links
- Website: https://healthgait.com
- SolvingHealth: https://solvinghealth.com
